{{Quote|I'm afraid that grave times have come upon us.|[[Naren Bluuis]] reports the lost battle|<ref name="Relic" />}}
The '''Battle of H'ken asteroid belt''' was a skirmish that occurred in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], within the [[H'ken system/Legends|H'ken system]] asteroid belt which was located on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The battle began when forces from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] splinter group ambushed an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]], [[Nova (New Republic)|''Nova'']] while it was conducting a series of training maneuvers. The entire squadron was lost in the ensuing [[Starfighter combat/Legends|dogfight]], including two of the cruiser's best pilots. The Imperial faction, known as the [[Restored Empire|Kaarenth Dissension]], was allied with the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Durrei]], although it was unknown if he participated in the battle.<ref name="Relic" />
